meta.title: Kyle De Vares - Digital Portfolio
meta.description: Creative developer building polished web, brand, and marketing experiences.
meta.author: Kyle De Vares

branding.name: Kyle De Vares
branding.description: Creative developer passionate about building beautiful digital experiences that make a difference.

hero.headline: Hello, My name is Kyle De Vares
hero.description: I design and build digital work that feels clear, modern, and genuinely useful.

about.title: About me
about.body: I'm a passionate creative developer with expertise in web design, graphic design, and digital marketing. I love creating beautiful, functional digital experiences that make a difference. With a background in both design and development, I bring a unique perspective to every project.

projectsSection.title: Projects
projectsSection.description: Selected work across design, marketing, and development.

projectsPage.title: All Projects
projectsPage.description: Explore my complete portfolio of work.

timelineSection.title: Timeline
timelineSection.description: The path from learning the fundamentals to building polished digital experiences across design and development.

items.description: Leading development of web applications, improving delivery standards, and mentoring junior developers across the team.
Designed interfaces, prototypes, and brand systems for client projects, translating ideas into polished user experiences.
Started building responsive websites, learning modern frameworks, and developing the design-meets-code approach that defines my work now.
Graduated with honors in Computer Science, with a strong focus on web technologies, digital systems, and problem-solving fundamentals.

contactSection.title: Get In Touch
contactSection.description: If you need a website, branding support, or a more polished digital presence, send over the details and I will get back to you.
contactSection.introBody: Share the project, timeline, and what you need help with. I can support design, development, and digital marketing work.

form.title: Send Me a Message
form.note: Name, email, subject, and message are all ready to go.
form.helper: Include the type of work you need, the target launch window, and any links or references.
form.subjectPlaceholder: Website redesign, branding refresh, campaign support...
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell me about your project, timeline, goals, and anything else that would be useful.

footer.description: Creative developer passionate about building beautiful digital experiences that make a difference.
